formal_proof_artifacts.role: geometric tail sum formula for extended K grid (K≤3, N≤3)

theorem_content.abstract: Same as schwinger_interaction_delta_certificate but on an extended K grid. The geometric tail formula (proved) and N-limit (proved conditionally) apply. The extended grid reveals worsened N-tail behavior at K=3 (n_tail_worsened_at_k3=True), honestly reported.
theorem_content.honest_failure: status=failed_occupation_tail_after_k_extension. The analytic cert certifies the tail formula soundness, not the convergence of the finite computation.
